---
title: "Sensor Network"
format: html 
execute:
    echo: false
    message: false
    warning: false
---

## Bahamas Sea Level Sensor Locations 

``` {r: map}

library(leaflet)

# Define data
sensors <- data.frame(
  name = c("Nassau", "Freeport", "Exuma"),
  lat = c(25.0443, 26.5285, 23.6190),
  lon = c(-77.3504, -78.6954, -75.9695)
)

# Build map (NO pipes to avoid dependency issues)
m <- leaflet()
m <- addProviderTiles(m, providers$CartoDB.Positron)
m <- setView(m, lng = -76.5, lat = 24.5, zoom = 6)

m <- addMarkers(
  m,
  lng = sensors$lon,
  lat = sensors$lat,
  popup = sensors$name,
  label = sensors$name
)

m

```
